name: HNA Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: HNA Technology Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, provides IT distribution and supply chain services. It provides HNA cloud and artificial intelligence platform, as well as technology solutions. The company was formerly known as Tianjin Tianhai Investment Co., Ltd and changed its name to HNA Technology Co., Ltd. in April 2018. HNA Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
